hooks.command: changed=$(git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$changed" -gt 3 ]; then echo '⚠️ 文档同步提醒：本次变更 '$changed' 个文件，请确认 CODE_INDEX / scripts/INDEX / PARQUET_SCHEMA_KNOWLEDGE / CLAUDE.md 注册表章节是否需要同步更新'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git push'; then large=$(find . -not -path './.git/*' -not -path './node_modules/*' -size +50M 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$large" ]; then echo "⚠️ 发现大文件 (>50MB)，推送前请处理："; echo "$large" | while read f; do ls -lh "$f" 2>/dev/null; done; echo "
建议：添加到 .gitignore 或配置 Git LFS"; exit 1; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git push'; then branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then echo "❌ 禁止直接推送到 $branch。请使用 /commit-push-pr（自动创建分支 + PR）"; exit 2; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git push'; then conflicts=$(grep -rn -E '^(<{7}|={7}|>{7})( |$)' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.js' --include='*.mjs' --include='*.py' --include='*.md' --include='*.json' --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git . 2>/dev/null | head -10); if [ -n "$conflicts" ]; then echo "❌ 发现未解决的冲突标记，禁止推送："; echo "$conflicts"; exit 2; fi; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git push'; then if ! bun run governance > /tmp/governance-precheck.log 2>&1; then echo "❌ governance 校验失败，禁止推送："; tail -30 /tmp/governance-precheck.log; exit 2; fi; fi
